channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Yachts Jobs
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Palma de Mallorca
Description:

Experienced Director of Operations sought for the superyacht sector in Palma de Mallorca. This leadership role requires a strong understanding of high-end yacht operations, team management, and project oversight in a technical environment. Responsibilities include managing specialist teams and collaborating with captains and owners' representatives to ensure exceptional service delivery. Ideal candidates possess superyacht operations experience, rigging knowledge, and excellent communication skills.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Director of Operations Job - Superyacht Sector at Proteus Professionals

item.description:
Location: UK
Description:

A Network Engineering Manager is sought for a field-based role in the UK, involving international travel. The position focuses on designing, configuring, and commissioning network and telecommunications systems for high-end superyachts and residential projects. Essential qualifications include strong network engineering experience, excellent communication and client-facing skills, and expertise in wireless networks, fiber optics, and telecoms systems.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Network Engineering Manager Job - Superyachts at Engineering jobs, UK

item.description:
Location: Antibes
Description:

Experienced Captain required for a private 24m motor yacht based in Antibes. Immediate start with a competitive salary offered. The ideal candidate will be a hard worker, proactive, reliable, and committed to maintaining high standards onboard.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Captain Job on 24m Motor Yacht at linkedin

item.description:
Location: Mediterranean
Description:

A temporary Crew Chef is sought for a 95m private and charter motor yacht operating in the Mediterranean. This role involves preparing varied meals for a large crew on a busy vessel. Candidates require previous experience as a Crew Chef on large yachts, strong organisational skills, and immediate availability. A Schengen visa or European passport is necessary. The contract is for approximately two months, with a competitive day rate offered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Chef Job on 95m Motor Yacht at Seven Seas Recruitment

item.description:
Location: Albania
Description:

Experienced workers are sought for interior yacht components finishing roles in Albania. This position offers a competitive salary and benefits, with opportunities for long-term career growth. Immediate hiring is available for qualified candidates seeking international employment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Yacht Interior Finishing Workers Job in Albania at JobsGlobal.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Seeking a skilled Carpenter and Technician for a yacht position. Responsibilities include general carpentry work and technical maintenance onboard. Previous experience in a similar role is preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Yacht Carpenter and Technician Job at linkedin

item.description:
Location: Key West, Florida
Description:

Skilled and dependable Maintenance Mechanics are sought for a yacht maintenance role in Key West, Florida. This position involves performing a wide range of maintenance, repair, and troubleshooting tasks across various marine systems and equipment. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in mechanical and electrical systems, with a strong background in marine electrical systems troubleshooting and propulsion systems maintenance. Familiarity with rigging, fabrication, and welding is also beneficial. This is an employee-owned company offering health, dental, vision, and life insurance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Yacht Mechanic Job in Key West, Florida at Hartman Yacht Maintenance inc.

item.description:
Location: France
Description:

A relief Chief Officer is required for a 60-meter motor yacht operating in France. This 10-week position starts on August 8th and requires a Chief Mate or Master 3000 license. The role involves a busy charter/private program with an above-industry standard salary. The itinerary includes the end of the Mediterranean season, a crossing, and the start of the Caribbean season.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job on 60m Motor Yacht at YOA Yacht Crew

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for hospitality professionals aboard luxury yachts. This role offers a unique chance to contribute to reimagining luxury at sea. Key requirements and specific joining details will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Hospitality Jobs on Luxury Yachts at Four Seasons Yachts

item.description:
Location: Summer Isles, Scotland
Description:

A Commercial Skipper is sought for a unique restoration and regeneration charity operating passenger transport, crew & cargo movements, logistics support, and fuel-transfer operations in the Summer Isles, Scotland. This year-round role requires strong boat-handling skills, experience in exposed coastal waters, and essential tickets including RYA Advanced Powerboat/OOW and Commercial Endorsement. Commutable to Badentarbat Bay is necessary, with potential accommodation available. A 10 on / 4 off shift pattern may be considered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Commercial Skipper Job - Summer Isles, Scotland at Clyde Marine Recruitment
